name: Settley
description: Settley is a tokenised real estate platform that lets anyone invest in fractional property ownership through blockchain. Users can buy, sell, and earn yield from real-world property assets tokenised on-chain. Designed for people who want exposure to real estate without the capital barrier of buying a whole property. Authority and trust are the core brand values.
audience: retail investors, property-curious millennials, DeFi users seeking real-world assets, high-income renters priced out of property ownership
